feed.title: __elfie___
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from __elfie___

entry.title: Yes… I am in my pajamas, yes they are dirty 🤣 I also just want to clarify I am still very grateful for those views & viewers. I’m just taken a back by the amount of followers I have who enjoy my outfit content (there are over 400k+ of you!) & how many of

entry.title: This skirt from @Ynhoia is actually a multi garment! It can be worn as a long or short skirt, a dress or a poncho! 🤯🖤 #fypシ #altmodel #alternative #darkfashion #darkwear

entry.title: Don’t forget: I know who you *really* are. Fascinating choice. I wonder if you realized it’s a wonderful depiction of how you treated me all those years? 🤣 Of course you haven’t. You’re a narcissist - among other things. The devil will catch up to you eve
